security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'none'

bundle.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Bradley Waye. Licensed under PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0.
bundle.shortDescription: Local-first, encrypted register for a watch collection.
bundle.longDescription: Watch Register keeps a private, encrypted record of a physical watch collection: provenance, service history, insurance schedules, realized and unrealized gains, and estate instructions. It runs entirely offline and makes no network requests.
